validation.summary: Codex lifecycle failed after host exit and Claude fixture routing was blocked before dispatch. No side-by-side lifecycle action can truthfully prove host independence or shared live-run takeover.

review.evidence: The cross-host cell remains explicitly not executed; no host package, settings, or shared state was mutated by this task.

obligation_evidence.evidence: The exact cross-host cell names both host versions and preserves the upstream non-ready conditions without manufacturing an independence or takeover claim.

recovery: Repair the Codex managed-child lifetime and Claude fixture-routing environment, then rerun each original host lifecycle chain before any cross-host action.
